title: Want to enable 2FA for select guest accounts rather than all guest accounts.
excerpt: A client who has a guest account in our Monday.com work management instance wants us to enable 2FA for their accounts. Is there a way to do this without enabling it for all guest accounts already created in our instance. …

posts.author: mfuhrmann (Meghan Fuhrmann)
posts.cookedHtml: A client who has a guest account in our Monday.com work management instance wants us to enable 2FA for their accounts. Is there a way to do this without enabling it for all guest accounts already created in our instance.
